title: Nursery Rhyme. CCX. Riddles.
content:
[Pair of tongs.]

        Long legs, crooked thighs,
        Little head and no eyes.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCX. Riddles."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
